notes: Torrent peer discovery fix: add public trackers alongside DHT so downloads no longer sit at 0 B/s for 60+ seconds waiting on a cold DHT bootstrap (private trackers unaffected). Peer count now shows only live/usable peers. HTTP downloads: batched disk writes for better throughput, and transient errors now retry from the last written byte instead of failing the whole download. Added on-disk logging for diagnosing torrent issues.
